LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT FREMONT BANK, INDIVIDUALLY AND AS TRUSTEE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.DEFENDANT FREMONT BANK'S DEMURRER TO BOTH CAUSES OF ACTION IN THE COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF STATE HOSPITALS IS OFF CALENDAR WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO BEING REFILLED IF AND WHEN THE STAY OF THIS CASE IS LIFTED. ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION, BUT PER THE LOGIC OF THE BANK'S ARGUMENT THAT THIS CASE SHOULD BE DECIDED IN THE PROBATE DIVISION OF THIS COURT AND DSH'S CONSENT TO A STAY OF THIS CASE, THIS CASE IS STAYED PENDING THE CONCLUSION OF DSH'S CREDITOR CLAIMS PENDING IN THE PROBATE DIVISION OR FURTHER COURT ORDER. ORDER IS SIGNED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS) JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, REPORTED. =(302/HK)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-27-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT FREMONT BANK, INDIVIDUALLY AND AS TRUSTEE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

Defendant Fremont Bank's demurrer to both causes of action in the complaint filed by plaintiff California Department of State Hospitals is off calendar without prejudice to being refilled if and when the stay of this case is lifted. On the court's own motion, but per the logic of the Bank's argument that this case should be decided in the probate division of this court and DSH's consent to a stay of this case, this case is stayed pending the conclusion of DSH's creditor claims pending in the probate division or further court order.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/HK)
